Our Home

More than care.
A place to belong.

San Jacinto Assisted Living, LLC is dedicated to enriching the lives of our residents through thoughtful care, engaging activities, and a true sense of belonging.

Our dedicated team is here every step of the way to ensure comfort, safety, and peace of mind — in a home that feels, in every sense, like family.

Tours

Care, given by hand and by heart

Our Promise

Every resident deserves comfort, connection, and compassionate care — we build our entire home around that belief.

Comfort

A calm, familiar home environment where residents can truly settle in and feel at ease.

Community

Engaging activities and genuine companionship that bring warmth and joy to everyday life.

Compassion

Round-the-clock support delivered by a team that treats every resident with warmth and dignity.

Our Services

Tailored care, from morning to night

Personalized Care Plans

Tailored support designed around each resident's unique needs and preferences.

24/7 Supervision

Round-the-clock supervision from compassionate, trained staff.

Nutritious Meals

Home-prepared meals and snacks that nourish the body and delight the palate.

Social Activities

Engaging programs that foster connection, joy, and mental wellness.

Respite Care / Short-Term Stays

Temporary, compassionate care giving families peace of mind and primary caregivers a well-deserved break.

Hospice Care Waiver

Approved for up to 8 hospice beds — compassionate, dignified end-of-life care in a familiar home setting.

★ Proudly Serving Our Veterans

Honoring those who served, and the families who stood beside them.

We welcome veterans and surviving spouses into our home, and gladly assist families in utilizing VA Aid & Attendance benefits to help cover the cost of care — because those who served deserve comfort in return.

Ask About VA Aid & Attendance

Plan Your Visit

What to expect when you visit

  • I.

    A warm welcome

    Meet our administrator and take a relaxed, unhurried walkthrough of the home.

  • II.

    Meet our caregiving team

    Get to know the compassionate staff who will be part of your loved one's daily life.

  • III.

    Discuss the right plan

    Talk through personalized care needs, hospice options, and VA Aid & Attendance support.
